issues.problem: Use case statement about targeting black and grey coats is unsupported by review evidence.
issues.example: "A color enhancing shampoo especially designed for white, black and grey coats." has no supporting quotes mentioning black or grey coats.

recommendations: Remove or revise the use case targeting black and grey coats to align with evidence.
Add more explicit messaging about quick shipping as a selling point based on positive review comments.
Clarify whitening expectations in messaging to manage customer perceptions better.
Consider adding more evidence or testimonials for black and grey coat effectiveness if targeting those segments.

keep: Target audience of white/silver-haired and show dog owners
Offers and risk mitigation related to whitening perception
change: Use case to remove unsupported claims about black and grey coats
Messaging to include quick shipping as a benefit
remove: Unsupported evidence quotes about black and grey coats
